subphases.name: Fresh Review Data And Ops Hardening
Proof Runner Isolation And Waiting-Window Runbook
Retention Restore Delete And Compaction Workflows

commandGates.command: bun run check
bun run config-sync
bun run --filter @beep/duckdb check && bun run --filter @beep/duckdb test
cd packages/tooling/library/ai-metrics && bun run check && bun run test && bun run lint && bun run docgen
cd packages/tooling/tool/cli && bun run check && bun run test && bun run lint

bun run beep ai-metrics forwarder timer --target dankserver --data-root .beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --json

cd /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect-worktrees/ai-metrics-p6-proof && bun run beep ai-metrics forwarder timer --target dankserver --repo-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect-worktrees/ai-metrics-p6-proof --data-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect/.beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --otlp-base-url 'https://dankserver.tailc7c348.ts.net:8447' --interval-minutes 15 --max-file-bytes 8388608 --max-files 5 --json

BEEP_AI_METRICS_RAW_ARCHIVE_KEY="$(op read 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key')" bun run beep ai-metrics archive drill --target dankserver --data-root .beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --json

umask 077; proof_root="$(mktemp -d -t ai-metrics-p7-proof-data.XXXXXXXXXX)"; rsync -a --delete /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect/.beep/ai-metrics/ "$proof_root/"; printf 'AI_METRICS_P7_PROOF_DATA_ROOT=%s\n' "$proof_root"
bun run beep ai-metrics mirror build --target dankserver --data-root "${AI_METRICS_P7_PROOF_DATA_ROOT:?run ai-metrics-p7-disposable-proof-copy first}" --json
bun run beep ai-metrics mirror sync --bundle latest --data-root "${AI_METRICS_P7_PROOF_DATA_ROOT:?run ai-metrics-p7-disposable-proof-copy first}" --json
ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 dankserver-yubi "sh -lc 'if test -f /srv/data/ai-metrics/p7-derived-mirror/manifest.json; then echo present; else echo missing; fi'"
bun run beep ai-metrics mirror build --target dankserver --data-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect/.beep/ai-metrics --remote-root /srv/data/ai-metrics/p7-derived-mirror --json

bun run beep ai-metrics mirror sync --target dankserver --data-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect/.beep/ai-metrics --bundle latest --host dankserver-yubi --remote-root /srv/data/ai-metrics/p7-derived-mirror --confirm p7-derived-mirror --json
bun run beep ai-metrics mirror status --target dankserver --host dankserver-yubi --remote-root /srv/data/ai-metrics/p7-derived-mirror --json
bun run beep ai-metrics retention list --data-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect/.beep/ai-metrics --json

umask 077; restore_root="$(mktemp -d -t ai-metrics-p7-restore.XXXXXXXXXX)"; BEEP_AI_METRICS_RAW_ARCHIVE_KEY="$(op read 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key')" bun run beep ai-metrics retention restore-drill --data-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect/.beep/ai-metrics --restore-root "$restore_root" --before <REPLACE_WITH_ISO_8601_TIMESTAMP> --json
cd infra && bun run check && bun run test && bun run lint
cd infra && PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE=<resolved-secret> pulumi preview -s beep-ai-metrics-dankserver --non-interactive --diff
cd infra && PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE=<resolved-secret> pulumi up -s beep-ai-metrics-dankserver --yes --non-interactive

bun run beep ai-metrics report weekly --target dankserver --data-root .beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --json

The isolated-runner config has a human-approved outcome label and intermediate completion-ready scorecard, but still requires elapsed proof time and the final seven-day report
P7a/b hybrid mirror and local retention workflows are implemented, but final confirmed mirror sync/status is deferred until after the credited proof report
Optional LiteLLM deployment remains deferred beyond the Phoenix-only P5b slice
xAI, Venice, LiteLLM, and gateway enrichment remain deferred to non-blocking P7c follow-up
Dashboard and backend expansion remains deferred to non-blocking P7d follow-up

nextAction: Keep the isolated proof-runner timer running through May 16, 2026 02:26 America/Chicago, generate the final credited seven-day report after the proof window elapses, then run the P7e sanitized mirror build/sync/status closeout; keep P7c/P7d as non-blocking follow-up work.
